operations.name: teleport
operations.summary: Move an entity to a tile.

operations.name: conjureFixture
operations.summary: Create a discrete fixture, prop, shrine, marker, or place feature.
operations.promptGuidance: Use conjureFixture for a single non-actor object or place feature such as a shrine, marker, sign, statue, brazier, plant, hazard, or landmark. Use createTiles for terrain areas, walls, bridges, and large shapes.

fields.template: generic_feature, shrine, marker, plant, hazard, or barrier_object
fields.name: visible name of the fixture
fields.fixtureType: feature, shrine, marker, plant, hazard, barrier, or another compact noun
fields.material: stone, wood, thorn, glass, ash, etc.
fields.blocksMovement: true for solid props, false for markers or hazards

operations.name: transformEntity
operations.promptGuidance: Use transformEntity for open-ended changes to a creature, prop, item, or fixture. Fields: target, name, material, addTags/removeTags, description, blocksMovement, blocksSight, glyph, palette, fixtureType, interactableVerbs. Use this for collapse/repair/retune-style prop changes instead of inventing a one-off operation.

fields.name: optional new visible name
fields.interactableVerbs: verbs to add, such as examine, climb, cross, open

operations.name: transformItem
operations.promptGuidance: Use transformItem for magic acting on reagents, fixtures, doors, signs, bridges, shrines, and props. It can rename, change material, add/remove tags, alter passability/sight blocking, set glyph/palette, retag fixtureType, and add interactable verbs.

fields.target: selected item, fixture, prop, or explicit entity id
fields.name: optional new visible name
fields.interactableVerbs: verbs to add, such as examine, climb, cross, open

operations.name: possess
operations.summary: Move the caster's soul into a vulnerable nearby body.

operations.name: createPromise
operations.summary: Add a promise to the world.

operations.name: createTrigger
operations.summary: Create a turn-pump trigger for delayed effects, wards, and auras.
operations.promptGuidance: Use one createTrigger shape for delayed tactical effects, auras, and ward-like pulses. Fields: kind, delay, interval, uses, anchor, radius, targetFilter, effectType, effect/status/amount/text. Use effectType consequence with consequenceType plus payload fields when a trigger should deliver a typed world consequence.

fields.anchor: entity or point the trigger is attached to
fields.effectType: addStatus, damage, heal, message, or consequence
fields.effect: optional nested effect object with type and fields; for type consequence include consequenceType and payload fields

operations.name: consequence
operations.summary: Submit one typed world consequence through the shared applier.
operations.promptGuidance: Use consequence for local effects already owned by the shared consequence grammar. Fields: consequenceType, target or targetEntityId, consequencePayload, and optional timing. Use timing after_turn, world_pump, or deferred for one delayed consequence; use scheduleEvent/createTrigger for broad future events, repeating triggers, auras, wards, or hooks.

fields.consequenceType: typed consequence kind such as add_tags, apply_status, message, update_want, offer_service, request_service
fields.target: ordinary spell target reference such as self, nearest_enemy, selected_target, or an entity id
fields.targetEntityId: explicit entity id when not using target resolution
fields.consequencePayload: typed fields for the selected consequence
